parsed.artifact_title: Memory Access Alone Does Not Solve Working-Set Management

claims.text: In Goal 8 the event-loop condition recovered all five required facts from the available evidence records.
In Goal 8 the event-loop condition still carried distractor material into the final artifact.
Goal 8 sharpened the finding that memory access alone is not sufficient for disciplined working-set use.

parsed.conclusion: Memory access alone is not sufficient for disciplined working-set management; it recovers required facts but also introduces distractor material into the final artifact.
parsed.recommended_action: Implement additional mechanisms such as filtering or explicit working-set boundaries to prevent contamination.

Each claim must have fact_id, text, status, and evidence_record_ids. Use fact_id values from this set only: ['goal8_contaminated_artifact', 'goal8_recovered_evidence', 'memory_access_not_sufficient'].
